blended.narrative: Mont Orford is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light rain showers, highs of 46°F.
Saturday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
